title: Enable permissions for Dashboards
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: Rabbie (Rabbie Jawahir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I created sales multiple quota trackers for each rep in my sales team and it’s filtered by the specific sales rep. Problem is that the sales reps have the ability to clear the filters in their quota dashboards and can see other sales reps sales data because it is pulled from the same board.

What are you trying to achieve

I want the ability to lock the filters so sales reps can not edit them to view other sales rep’s sales quota data.
